title: Vancouver Airport Authority prepares and negotiates Strategic Baggage Alliance Agreement with AviBC Aviation Services Ltd.
content:
## Vancouver Airport Authority prepares and negotiates Strategic Baggage Alliance Agreement with AviBC Aviation Services Ltd.
On June 1, 2024, the Vancouver Airport Authority ("YVR") closed the preparation and negotiations of a Strategic Baggage Alliance Agreement (the "SBAA") with AviBC Aviation Services Ltd. ("AviBC"), an affiliate of Aviation Business Continuity Ltd., an aviation logistics business based out of the London Heathrow Airport.
McCarthy Tétrault advised the Vancouver Airport Authority with a team led by Jody Aldcorn (Financial Services) that included Joe Furness (Business).
